ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Ad Illustriss. & Excellentiss. Dom. D. Marinum Franciscum Caracciolum Abellinatum Principem. His accessere Ejusdem Authoris Opera quaedam Posthuma numquam ante hac edita.
ItacWorkItem.Illustration: Engraving|Temple; statues of Philolaus and Timaeus
ItacWorkItem.Notes: In the preface to the reader, Leonardo Di Capua mentions the Investiganti Academy in Naples. Miscellaneous text containing correspondence and a posthumously published work by the author printed in Naples in 1688.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
